subject: WM-0179 blocked
body: The sole authorized synthetic dry output-shape check failed before replacement admission because current Windows PowerShell/.NET does not provide System.Double.IsFinite. It emitted a method-invocation error and fail-closed throw with no DRY_OUTPUT_OK line. Per the any-issue/no-retry recovery procedure, dry retry count is 0, replacement admission pair count is 0, benchmark invocation count remains 0, and product checkpoint 0882988 is unchanged. See coordination/reports/WM-0179.md.
